estimate.narrative_context: Federal estate tax avoided on $9M of life insurance proceeds owned in ILIT (rather than personal-owned and pulled into estate at §2042) at 40% federal estate tax rate.

scenario_range.computation_method: Low: $5M face × 40%; Mid: $9M × 40% recommended program; High: $11M × 40% if liquidity layer sized larger to projected estate tax obligation

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts ILIT document with corporate or non-beneficiary individual trustee.
sub_steps: Trustee selection: corporate trustee or non-spouse non-beneficiary individual
Avoid spouse/beneficiary trustee to preserve §2042 exclusion

action_items.description: Obtain ILIT EIN and open trust bank account.
ILIT applies for and owns life insurance policies from inception to avoid §2035 3-year lookback.
sub_steps: Insurance application by trust as policyowner

action_items.description: Establish Crummey notice procedures and annual premium funding cycle.
sub_steps: Trustee sends written Crummey notices to beneficiaries on each contribution
Document withdrawal rights, demand period (30-60 days), and lapse

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Confirm annual ILIT premium funded and Crummey notices sent for {{rec_id}}

action_items.description: Annual review of ILIT coverage adequacy and premium funding.

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Annual ILIT review: confirm coverage adequacy and premium funding for {{rec_id}}

recommendations._audit_notes: Premium estimate $80K/yr is illustrative pending carrier underwriting; face amounts pulled from coordinated REC-RSK-001 ($5M buy/sell) and REC-RSK-004 ($4M estate liquidity).

estimate.narrative_context: Cumulative federal estate-tax savings from housing the entire transfer architecture (annual exclusion gifts, GRAT remainder, IDGT distributions and growth) in children's trusts outside the taxable estate over a 20-year program.

scenario_range.computation_method: Low/Mid/High range from rec file QUANTIFIED IMPACT FRAMEWORK ($4M-$8M cumulative estate-tax savings for Holloway-scale clients)

action_items.description: Decide structural variant: per-child trusts versus single pot trust.
Estate attorney drafts trust documents (per-child or pot per firm policy).
sub_steps: Broader standards or staged distributions thereafter

action_items.description: Select trustee(s) — corporate trustee (preferred) or non-parent individual.
sub_steps: Corporate trustee fees typically 0.5%-1% of trust assets/year

action_items.description: Obtain trust EIN(s) and open trust bank account(s).
Establish Crummey notice procedures and document workflow.
Begin annual contribution program and coordinate with downstream GRAT/IDGT remainder.

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Confirm annual contributions and trustee reports for children's trusts {{rec_id}}

recommendations._audit_notes: decisions_needed=true because per-child vs pot trust structure is a values-driven decision point flagged in rec file as [CONFIRM WITH WILL] firm default.

estimate.narrative_context: Estimated value transferred to children's trusts free of gift tax over 3-year GRAT term, computed as $8.2M after-discount funding × ((1.18)^3 − (1.05)^3) at §7520 hurdle of 5.0% (current at funding, May 2026) and 18% assumed annual business growth.

scenario_range.computation_method: Low: business stalls below 5% §7520 hurdle, GRAT unwinds at zero gift cost; Mid: 18% growth assumption per Holloway, ~$4.2M remainder; High: transaction event during/just after term unwinds discount, increasing remainder to ~$6M+

action_items.description: Confirm prerequisites: F-reorg complete, recap complete, qualified appraisal in hand for non-voting interest.
Estate attorney drafts GRAT trust document.
Engage qualified appraiser for non-voting interest valuation at funding.
CPA runs Walton-zeroed-out annuity calculation at current §7520 rate (5.00%, May 2026).
Fund GRAT by transferring appraised non-voting interest with documented stock/unit transfer.
Coordinate annual annuity payments and ongoing administration through 3-year term to remainder distribution.
sub_steps: First payment within 105 days of trust anniversary
In-kind payments allowed at then-current FMV
Maintain annual annuity calculations and FMV documentation

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Check in with {{partner_type}} on GRAT funding milestones (appraisal, trust execution, funding transfer) for {{rec_id}}

recommendations._audit_notes: §7520 rate 5.00% read from volatile_rates_lookup (May 2026). 30% LOM/LOC discount illustrative pending qualified appraisal — house position is to engage appraiser rather than cite specific discount in plan.

estimate.narrative_context: Estimated additional wealth transferred outside Marcus's estate via 9-year IDGT installment sale of post-recap non-voting interest at AFR, plus ongoing income-tax burn paid by grantor as backdoor tax-free gift to trust beneficiaries.

scenario_range.computation_method: Low/High per Holloway worked example ($6M-$10M default; up to $15M if growth + transaction event compound favorably and income tax burn over 9-yr note adds another $1-3M)

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts IDGT trust with §675(4) substitute power triggering grantor-trust status.
Make seed gift of ~10% of intended sale value to trust; file Form 709 documenting lifetime exemption use.
Engage qualified appraiser for non-voting interest valuation at sale.
Execute sale documents: stock/unit purchase agreement and promissory note at current AFR.
sub_steps: Note rate at or above AFR to avoid imputation

action_items.description: CPA prepares tax memo confirming grantor-trust status and §1014 basis treatment.
Administer note over 9-year term: annual interest payments, 1041 grantor trust statement, valuation tracking, and ultimate note payoff.

auto_generated_reminder_template.reminder_text_template: Check in with {{partner_type}} on IDGT note interest, 1041 filing, and valuation tracking for {{rec_id}}

recommendations._audit_notes: AFR rate cited as 4.50% illustrative (long-term annual) — actual rate from May 2026 Rev. Rul. is marked [VERIFY] in volatile_rates_lookup; flagging stale verification at lookup level rather than blocking quantification. Range $6M-$10M from rec file template; $15M upper extends per Holloway combined-impact figure.

estimate.narrative_context: Estimated federal estate tax avoided over 25-year horizon by funding $5M SLAT growing at 7%/year to $27M outside both spouses' estates, taxed at 40% federal estate tax rate.

Annual trustee accounting and distribution administration.

recommendations._audit_notes: Status Active-Cautioned per rec file metadata (reciprocal trust doctrine + irrevocability through divorce risk). $5M illustrative funding; client may choose different exemption use level.

estimate.narrative_context: Estimated GST tax avoided across two generations by allocating $30M of GST exemption to dynasty trust(s) growing at 5%/year over 60 years to ~$560M, taxed at 40% absent allocation.

computation_inputs.trust_situs_consideration: Georgia RAP applies; consider DE/SD/NV for true dynasty (cross-ref REC-SPC-001)

scenario_range.computation_method: Low: shorter horizon / lower growth ($30M@4%×40yr×40%≈$60M); Mid: rec file worked example (60yr@5%); High: longer horizon / higher growth (80yr@6%)

action_items.description: Estate attorney drafts GST-exempt trust language across applicable irrevocable trusts.

sub_steps: Coordinate with REC-SPC-001 Multi-State Trust Situs

action_items.description: File Form 709 with explicit GST exemption allocation at funding events.
Maintain GST inclusion ratio tracking across all funding events and coordinate with children's-trust funding.

recommendations._audit_notes: Quantification per rec file's worked example; large nominal value reflects 60-year compounding and is intentionally illustrative.

estimate.narrative_context: Estimated federal estate tax avoided by transferring $1.4M Blue Ridge vacation home to 12-year QPRT at current §7520 rate of 5.0% (May 2026), with appreciation passing outside estate; computed as ($2.5M projected future value − $400K gift value) × 40%.

scenario_range.computation_method: Low: donor dies during 12-yr term (full residence in estate, no benefit); Mid: rec file worked example; High: stronger appreciation + rent paid to trusts post-term as additional outside-estate transfer

Administer QPRT through 12-year term and transition to FMV-rent lease at term end.

quantified_impact.qualitative_phrasing: Updates beneficiary designations across all retirement, life insurance, annuity, and TOD/POD accounts to align with the new estate plan; designations override wills and are the single most-overlooked failure point in HNW estate planning.

action_items.description: Inventory all accounts with beneficiary designations (retirement, life insurance, annuities, TOD/POD).
Pull current designations from each custodian and compare against current estate plan and family situation.
Submit updated designations via custodian forms; obtain see-through trust language from attorney where trust is named beneficiary.
sub_steps: Each custodian has its own form
Trust beneficiary requires see-through language to preserve stretch benefit

action_items.description: Confirm receipt and recording with each custodian; document designations in central beneficiary log.
Annual beneficiary designation review (life-event triggered or calendar-driven).

recommendations._audit_notes: State D — rec file lacks a true quantified savings formula; impact is probate-avoidance + family-dispute-avoidance + stretch-benefit-preservation, all qualitative.
